stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An Airborne Weather Radar display is shown with the locations of three aerodromes shown. What are the likely levels of precipitation at aerodromes B and C?

options.a: At aerodrome B, no or low precipitation, conditions at aerodrome C cannot be determined.
options.b: Conditions at aerodrome B cannot be determined. At aerodrome C, no or low precipitation.
options.c: No or low precipitation at both aerodromes.
options.d: Low precipitation at B because the thunderstorm cell has already passed.
